name: R-CADE Easter Egg Game Party
description: Join us for a bumper 2 hour Easter fun game session. We will have our classic retro games available to play, an Easter egg hunt in the arcade, with other egg-celent activities to take part in throughout the day.
short_description: A 2-hour Easter fun game session with retro games, an Easter egg hunt, and egg-celent activities at R-CADE.
